name: Lakeside Pool Deck Plan – 17x41 Deck with Oval Pool Opening + Wraparound Railing
open_features: Large oval pool opening (approx. 18×33 ft pool designed separately by others)
6×6 posts (SP No.2) on 18×18×12 in concrete footings
Joists: 2×6 SP No.2 @ 12 in O.C. with Simpson H1A hurricane ties
Decking: 2×6 composite decking boards with 1/8 in gap
Wraparound railing with 4×4 posts @ 4 ft O.C.
Guardrails: 2×4 top and bottom rails with 2×2 balusters
Dual stair access with 2×12 stair stringers @ 12 in O.C.
Stair footings: 48×24×4 in concrete landing pads
Blocking between joists for lateral stability
safety_note: This plan illustrates only the structural deck system around an oval pool opening. Pool shell, bonding/grounding, fencing, alarms, pumps, and anti-entrapment systems must be designed and installed by licensed pool professionals per NEC and IRC pool safety requirements.
